English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
George Good papers
Good, George.
New York State Nurserymen\'s Association
New York State Arborists Association
21-25-3493
1.2 cubic feet. 1.2 cubic feet.
1928-1998. Correspondence, Manuscripts, Publications Includes correspondence, course material, publications and minutes of meetings of the New York State Nurserymen's Association (1928-1969) and the New York State Arborists Association (1965-1969).. Collection material in English 5797298
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
March 2008
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, March 2009
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Emeritus professor of Ornamental Horticulture, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, course material, publications and minutes of meetings of the New York State Nurserymen's Association (1928-1969) and the New York State Arborists Association (1965-1969)..
Cite As:
George Good papers, #21-25-3493. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Botany. Horticulture -- Study and teaching. Floriculture -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Faculty. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Students. New York State College of Agriculture. Department of Floriculture and Ornamental Horticulture
